overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a black sports car driving through Night City at night. The vehicle travels from city streets onto elevated highways, across bridges, and through dense neon-lit downtown areas before entering a covered underpass near a metro station. The scene features characteristic cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic billboards, towering skyscrapers, and atmospheric haze.

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a city street at night, driving toward an intersection. The vehicle turns right onto a highway ramp, transitioning from ground level to an elevated roadway. Street lamps and concrete overpasses dominate the scene as the car accelerates onto the highway.

segments.scene_description: Driving along a curved elevated highway with guardrails on both sides. The road surface is wet and reflective, with the distant city skyline and neon billboards visible ahead. The camera follows the car as it navigates the sweeping curve of the highway.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle crosses a bridge structure with metal railings and overhead lighting. A sign for Pacifica is visible ahead. The bridge provides a transition from the open highway to the dense urban core, with the road continuing into the brightly lit city center.

segments.scene_description: Driving through the dense urban canyon of downtown, surrounded by massive holographic billboards and towering corporate skyscrapers. The street is lined with neon advertisements and digital screens. The vehicle navigates through multi-lane traffic, passing under pedestrian overpasses as it moves deeper into the city center.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass with concrete walls and ceiling, blocking the open sky. The lighting shifts to artificial as the car approaches the M Ebunike metro station, identified by a prominent red sign. The road continues through the sheltered urban corridor with support pillars lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle ascends from ground-level city streets into a neon-drenched urban core before descending into a sheltered underpass. It begins on a dark city street, turning right onto a highway ramp that lifts the car from the ground toward an elevated roadway of concrete overpasses. As the vehicle navigates a sweeping curve on the wet, reflective highway, the scene opens up to reveal a distant skyline and glowing billboards before crossing a metal bridge marked with a sign for Pacifica. The environment then shifts into a dense urban canyon, where the camera glides past towering corporate skyscrapers and massive holographic advertisements amidst multi-lane traffic. Finally, the open sky vanishes as the car enters a concrete underpass, moving past support pillars toward the red signage of the M Ebunike metro station.
